/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/lexer/lexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/parser/parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/semantic/analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/codegen/codegen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/utils/compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/utils/cli.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/utils/diagnostics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/utils/project.cpp.o CMakeFiles/afrilang.dir/src/utils/stdlib_registry.cpp.o -o afrilang
